channel.title: My Blog
channel.description: A minimalist blog, built for words.

item.title: The Tech World with AI
item.description: Exploring the best careers and skills to develop in the AI era.

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description: A minimal blog inspired by Bear Blog, focused on content and simplicity.

item.title: Minimalism in Web Design
item.description: How less is more in web design and why minimalist blogs are gaining popularity.

item.title: Getting Started with Your First Post
item.description: A quick guide to creating your first blog post with markdown and frontmatter.
